messages.content: 翻译英文：参加电商平台营销活动
Participating in e-commerce platform marketing activities
市场洞察 英文表达
Market insights
英文翻译： 协同商品部和调研部开展消费者研究，分析电商平台产品数据、借势兔年IP，确定OR系列为新年营销主推款，选取4个产品打爆品策略，占领年轻化用户心智，产品售罄率103%；

The Product Department and Research Department collaborate on consumer research, analyzing e-commerce platform product data and leveraging the popularity of the Year of the Rabbit IP. They determine the OR series as the top New Year marketing product, selecting 4 products for explosive sales strategies, capturing the minds of a younger user base. The product sell-out rate reaches 103%.
换一种更口语的表达

The Product Department and Research Department team up to conduct consumer research, analyze product data on the e-commerce platform, and ride on the trend of the Year of the Rabbit IP. They decide to make the OR series the star of their New Year marketing campaign, selecting 4 products to implement a high-demand strategy. This successfully captures the attention of young users, resulting in a whopping 103% sell-out rate for the products.
爆品策略 英文
Buzzworthy strategy
打造跨界联名、IP事件营销，联动产品部和传播部和电商部和销售部落地“IP产品+粉丝经济”，线上视频发布、社媒网红深度种草、明星直播带货、QQ歌单发布、天猫会员营销；线下门店DP设计，承接线上打造闭环。站内关键字搜索环比提升359%，排名同行业4，社媒曝光量达2.6亿

Create cross-border collaborations and IP event marketing, synergizing the product department, communications department, e-commerce department, and sales department to implement "IP products + fan economy" strategy. This includes online video releases, influencer seeding on social media, celebrity live-streaming sales, QQ playlist releases, and Tmall membership marketing. Offline, DP design is utilized in-store to complement the online efforts and create a seamless experience. The internal keyword search performance has increased by 359% compared to the previous period, ranking 4th in the industry, and social media exposure has reached a staggering 260 million.
翻译成英文：追踪每月平台热点趋势，搭建KOL传播矩阵，在抖音小红书阵地确立以头腰部红人为主进行内容种草、信息流投放、明星seeding策略；牵头从大纲到视频、图文发布，监测内容效果，促进流量转化，整体曝光达到2.3亿，互动166w

Tracking monthly platform hot trends and establishing a KOL communication matrix, we focus on utilizing key opinion leaders (KOLs) on Douyin and Xiaohongshu for content seeding, native advertising, and celebrity seeding strategies. We take the lead in creating content from outlines to videos, images, and text publications, monitoring the effectiveness of the content, driving traffic conversion, and achieving an overall exposure of 230 million with 1.66 million interactions.
抖音信息流投放 英文
TikTok native advertising
负责快手500个家乡项目获得4A创意奖
Responsible for 500 hometown projects on Kwai (Kuaishou) winning the 4A Creative Award
翻译成英文：整合营销：独立负责味全乳酸菌品牌0-1、Fila新年主推产品定义到电商销售转化全流程、管理团队 落地10+S级项目，转化售罄103%，有强用户洞察、品类逻辑和生意思维

Integrated marketing: Independently responsible for managing the end-to-end process of converting Meiji probiotics brand, 0-1, Fila New Year's flagship products into e-commerce sales. Successfully executed 10+ S-level projects, achieving a remarkable 103% sell-out rate. Possessing strong user insights, category logic, and business acumen.
